# getEraSummaryLatest

Returns a summary of the current era, including era ID and validator weights.

## Import

```ts
import { RpcClient, HttpHandler } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Usage

```ts
const result = await rpcClient.getEraSummaryLatest();

console.log('Era ID:', result.eraSummary.eraId);
console.log('Block hash:', result.eraSummary.blockHash);
```

## Return Value

`Promise<ChainGetEraSummaryResult>`

```ts
interface ChainGetEraSummaryResult {
  eraSummary: EraSummary;
}

interface EraSummary {
  eraId: number;
  blockHash: Hash;
  storedValue: StoredValue; // EraInfo
  stateRootHash: Hash;
}
```
